	mov DPTR, #dptr_015A
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_013B
	mov A, #04h	;   4
	movx @DPTR, A
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B17
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3EA3:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_015E
	movx A, @DPTR
	jz jump_3EB9
	mov DPTR, #dptr_015E
	clr A
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_013B
	mov A, #08h	;   8
	movx @DPTR, A
	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B16
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3EB9:
	ret

	clr A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B4E
	movx @DPTR, A
	inc DPTR
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_3EC1:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_05F7
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_3ED6
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_3ED6
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_3ED6
	inc DPTR
	movx A, @DPTR
	jnz jump_3ED6
	mov R7, #01h	;   1
	ret

jump_3ED6:
	setb C
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B4F
	movx A, @DPTR
	subb A, #0E8h	; 232  -24 'è'
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B4E
	movx A, @DPTR
	subb A, #03h	;   3
	jc jump_3EE8
	mov R7, #00h	;   0
	ret

jump_3EE8:
	mov R7, #32h	;  50 '2'
	mov R6, #00h	;   0
	lcall jump_3753
	mov DPTR, #dptr_8B4E
	clr A
	mov 0F0h, #01h	;   1
	lcall jump_4280
	sjmp jump_3EC1

	nop
	mov 20h.0, C

end
